rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE INNOCENTE CASSOLATO TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Carol Cassolato And Jean Judnicks Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Carol Cassolato and Jean Judnick's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. It is not clear from the face of the complaint that the statute of limitations has run on the causes of action, specifically, the financial elder abuse count. The period of time in which the complaint alleges the causes of action occurred falls both beyond and within the applicable statute of limitations. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than May 26, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
